Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Meira]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Meira is behind Kiro.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Meira wields a scythe-blade of green flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Meira possesses pink-flower Goldsigns in her gray hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Meira was searching for the Blackflame boy with Kiro.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Meira is an Underlady who uses a scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Meira has an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Meira was reforged in soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Meira uses a Ruler technique to manipulate black roots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Meira is a gray-eyed and gray-haired woman with the spirit of an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Meira uses a scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Meira is an exceptional talent and skill user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Meira is a star Underlord of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — Meira can conjure life madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — Meira has sword and blood techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — Meira has gray eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Meira is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Meira gathers a ball of green light to launch a lance of life-madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Meira owes a debt to an unnamed man who trained her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Beneath Meira's armor are green and silver Remnant parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Meira's Path was not meant for combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Meira is a person Seishen Daji might have joined.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Meira is engaging a sword girl and her Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Meira is an ally of Daji and Kiro.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Meira is covered in life madra that has bloomed into a tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Meira threatened to kill Yerin's friends and family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Meira was carried in an owl.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Meira is a Seishen Underlady who previously tore apart Yerin's Blood Shadow.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Meira is an Underlady and a life artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Meira's Goldsign is a pink flower over one ear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Meira accompanied a squad of Seishen Kingdom Golds on a small cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Meira can sense Prince Daji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Meira is wearing full armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Meira was wearing full armor and looking up the stairs.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Meira repeats the Sage's messages to King Dakata.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Meira's loyalty to Prince Kiro shielded her from King Dakata's wrath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Meira possesses a cycling garden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Meira uses a scythe with a blade of green flame.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
